personality: Patient, weather-worn, superstitious. Speaks slowly with earthy wisdom and seasonal worry.

greetingPool.text: Morning, traveller. The harvest has been kind this year, thank the Lord.
Mind the furrows, if you please. These fields are all we have to feed the village.
Aye, it is hard work, but honest. Can I help you with something?

idlePool.text: The barley wants another week of sun. If the rains hold off, we shall eat well this winter.
Old Bess wandered into the north field again. That cow has more spirit than sense.
